javadoc_before:
/**

For IndexReader implementations that use * TermInfosReader to read terms, this returns the * current indexDivisor. * @see #setTermInfosIndexDivisor * @deprecated Please use {@link IndexReader#open(Directory, IndexDeletionPolicy, boolean, int)} to specify the required TermInfos index divisor instead. */
javadoc_after:
/**

For IndexReader implementations that use * TermInfosReader to read terms, this returns the * current indexDivisor as specified when the reader was * opened. */
